prompt: /tdd I need something that handles payments. like credit cards and stuff. also refunds maybe? idk the details yet

assertions.text: Triggers design gate (Phase 0) due to ambiguity
Asks clarifying questions — does NOT assume specific technologies
Asks questions one at a time, not a dump of 10 questions
Does NOT start writing code or tests before clarifying the spec
Waits for user approval before decomposing into work units
